ComponentType: Monolithic 3-Axis AMR (Anisotropic Magnetoresistance) Magnetic Sensor with Digital Interface
Description: The MMC5603NJ is a complete, monolithic 3-axis magnetic sensor that integrates AMR sensing elements, signal processing, and a digital I²C/I3C interface. It measures magnetic fields with a full-scale range of ±30 Gauss, offering high resolution (down to 0.0625 mG/LSB) and low noise (2 mG RMS). Key features include an on-chip automatic degaussing (SET/RESET) function to eliminate temperature-induced offset and residual magnetization, built-in sensitivity compensation, a temperature sensor, and low power consumption. It is designed for applications such as electronic compassing and position sensing, requiring minimal external components.

KeyParameters.Supply Current: 0.75 mA to 4.0 mA (depending on bandwidth mode)
